creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
AFAIK these so-called "maintenance releases" are just a snapshot of the development tree, and there is no full tarball available for them: it has to be made by mixing this partial tarball with a released tarball.

If you are interested, the port cad/opencascade should be forked to a new one cad/opencascade-devel (beware the conflicts!).
